ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the sample in years before present (BP) */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the sample in centimeters */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the sample (e.g., Pb210) */,
  "error" REAL /* Error margin for the sample in years */,
  "thickness" REAL /* Thickness of the sample in centimeters */,
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collection to which the sample belongs */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the sample */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the sample was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the sample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sample collection location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sample collection location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_collection_id FOREIGN KEY ("collection_id") REFERENCES sample_collections ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES sample_types ("type_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the type */,
  "standardized" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the type is standardized */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "climate_zone" TEXT /* Climate zone of the site */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., forest, desert) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the site was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the site */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_collections" (
  "collection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collection */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the samples were collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the samples were collected */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the samples */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who collected the samples */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the collection */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the collection was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_collections_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sampling_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_collections_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being analyzed */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used to analyze the sample */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "laboratory_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory where the analysis was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the analysis was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analyses_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analyses_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_analyses_laboratory_id FOREIGN KEY ("laboratory_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("laboratory_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analysis that produced the result */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was obtained */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES sample_analyses ("analysis_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution where the researcher is affiliated */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the researcher (e.g., professor, postdoc) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the researcher was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the researcher's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_samples" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_researchers" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user's information */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "laboratory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "laboratory_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the laboratory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the laboratory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the laboratory was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the laboratory's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("laboratory_id")
)
